_comment: Reference config for the Flask Railway service. In the Railway dashboard, set this service root directory to / (repo root) and set the start command to the value in deploy.startCommand below.

required.OPENAI_API_KEY: OpenAI API key for lead scoring and chatbot
required.COMPANIES_HOUSE_API_KEY: Companies House API key for business verification

optional.PORT: Set automatically by Railway — do not override manually
optional.PYTHONUNBUFFERED: Set to '1' to ensure logs appear in Railway
